synopsis: An in-universe intelligence file assembled by the Rebel Alliance in the wake of the mission to steal the Death Star plans. Framed as recovered Alliance records, it profiles the operatives of Rogue One and their allies, from Jyn Erso and Cassian Andor to K-2SO, Chirrut Îmwe, Baze Malbus, and Bodhi Rook, alongside the Rebel leadership and the Imperial figures who opposed them, chief among them Orson Krennic and Galen Erso. Through personnel dossiers, mission reports, and intelligence on the Empire's secret superweapon, it retraces the covert operation depicted in *Rogue One: A Star Wars Story* that delivered the Death Star's schematics into Rebel hands.
title: Rogue One: Rebel Dossier
